## Overview
Use this template if you are a developer looking to build out an implementation of the Coherent Framework blueprint, or if you have conceptual feedback on the design requirements.

## Your Implementation / Notes
Please share your approach to meeting the core design requirements outlined by Lead Architect Les Senters:
1. **Deterministic Memory Management:** (How does your code handle the data-zeroing logic?)
2. **Decoupled Isolation Layer:** (How is your execution engine isolated from external networks?)
3. **Automated Validation:** (Is your derived build passing the CI/CD requirements?)

## Derived Repository Link
If you have forked this project or built a functional module based on this architecture, please link your public repository here so the community can track your progress.
